data.title: Luxfer Declares Quarterly Dividend
data.description: Luxfer Holdings PLC, a global industrial company specializing in materials engineering, has declared a quarterly dividend of 13 cents per ordinary share. The dividend is set to be paid on May 6, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 17, 2026. Luxfer is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol LXFR and is known for its innovative work in niche applications.

data.title: Report on transactions with ALK-Abelló A/S B shares and associated securities by managerial staff
data.description: ALK-Abelló A/S, listed on ALKB:DC and Nasdaq Copenhagen as ALK B, has disclosed transactions by managerial staff in compliance with article 19 of Regulation (EU) No 596/2014 on market abuse. The report outlines the details of the specified transactions in accordance with the Market Abuse Regulation.

data.title: Draft resolutions prepared by the Board for the shareholders' meeting of Invalda INVL to be held on 30/04/2026
data.description: Invalda INVL (Company Code: 121304349) has drafted resolutions to be presented at the Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders scheduled for April 30, 2026. The meeting will take place at their registered office located at Gynėjų str 14 in Vilnius, Lithuania.

data.title: The Board of Invalda INVL proposed to allocate dividends for the year 2025
data.description: Invalda INVL's Board announced on 8 April 2026 its proposal for the Ordinary General Shareholders Meeting on 30 April 2026. They recommend a dividend of EUR 1.00 per share for 2025, totaling EUR 12.058 million in dividends.

data.title: Audited results of Invalda INVL Group for 2025
data.description: By the end of 2025, Invalda INVL disclosed an equity of EUR 256.2 million, translating to EUR 21.25 per share. These numbers represented increases of 22.1% and 21.8% compared to the previous year, factoring in the dividends distributed during that period.

data.title: $143M in BTC sold by Cango Bitcoin miner, cutting costs by 19% through equipment shutdown & debt repayment.
data.description: A mining company traded on the NYSE, Cango, successfully decreased expenses by 19% through the closure of ineffective equipment. Additionally, the company opted to sell Bitcoin as a means of reducing debt.

data.title: AMPERA Officially Opens World Headquarters in Florida
data.description: A leading advanced nuclear company is set to oversee global operations and research and development from its innovation campus in PALM BEACH GARDENS, Florida. On April 8, 2026, AMPERA marked the grand opening of its world headquarters, hosting over 150 attendees including community leaders, elected officials, and staff members.

data.title: THE MOST REWARDING LOYALTY PROGRAM IN LUXURY CRUISING: SILVERSEA ENHANCES ITS VENETIAN SOCIETY WITH NEW LOYALTY TIERS AND ENHANCED BENEFITS
data.description: Silversea, a prominent luxury and expedition travel brand, is revamping its Venetian Society loyalty program to provide customers with increased savings and additional onboard perks. The program updates aim to offer members more benefits while fostering customer loyalty. The changes will include various ways for guests to save money and enjoy unique experiences during their travels. The initiative is scheduled to roll out starting April 8, 2026, and is expected to impact a significant number of Silversea's loyal customers, promising a more enriching and rewarding travel experience for them.

data.title: Norwood Financial Corp schedules Q1 2026 earnings release and conference call.
data.description: The latest income report reveals a rise in profits for the third financial quarter. The company experienced a significant increase in revenue, with a notable surge of 15% compared to the previous quarter. Profits soared by 20%, surpassing expectations and reaching a total of $1.5 million. The positive financial performance was attributed to successful marketing strategies and cost-saving initiatives. Additionally, the company's market share expanded by 5%, reflecting growing consumer confidence in their products. The CEO expressed satisfaction with the results and emphasized the importance of continued growth and innovation in the upcoming quarters.

data.title: New Era Energy & Digital Announces Public Offering of Common Stock
data.description: In Midland, Texas, on April 8, 2026, New Era Energy & Digital, Inc. ("New Era" or the "Company") disclosed the launch of an underwritten public offering of shares of its common stock with a par value of $0.0001 per share. This offering is being carried out in accordance with an effective shelf registration statement on Form S-3 filed with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). The Company, listed on NASDAQ as NUAI, made this announcement regarding the commencement of the said offering.

data.title: Healthpeak Properties Announces Dates of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release, Conference Call, and Webcast
data.description: Denver-based Healthpeak Properties, Inc., a prominent healthcare real estate company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol DOC, is set to disclose its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 after NYSE trading closes on May 5, 2026. The company will conduct a conference call and webcast on May 6, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET to discuss its financial performance and operational outcomes. Investors and stakeholders can access the conference call through the provided platforms.

data.title: Efficient Markets to Host BLM May 2026 New Mexico and Texas Lease Sale
data.description: In Houston, Efficient Markets will be hosting the Bureau of Land Management’s online federal oil and gas lease sale in New Mexico and Texas. The sale will consist of 74 parcels covering a total of 33,530 acres and is set to take place on May 20, 2026. Efficient Markets has a history of collaboration with the BLM and is enthusiastic about managing this substantial lease sale. The majority of the parcels up for auction are situated in Eddy and.

data.title: Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. Announces Date for First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Conference Call
data.description: Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. (AQN) based in OAKVILLE, Ontario, will be announcing its first quarter financial results for 2026 on Friday, May 8, 2026, before the market opens. The earnings conference call is scheduled for the same day at 8:30 a.m. eastern time, featuring CEO Rod West and CFO Rob Stefani. Investors and analysts can participate in the call to gain insights into the company's performance. The conference call is set for Friday, May 8, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET.

data.title: P&G Recommends Stockholders Reject Mini-Tender Offer by Potemkin Limited
data.description: In Cincinnati, The Procter & Gamble Company (NYSE:PG) disclosed a mini-tender offer from Potemkin Limited to acquire a maximum of 10,000 shares of the company's common stock at $100.00 per share. This offer, which is about a 30% lower than the closing price of $143.16 on March 24, 2026, was unsolicited and shareholders are advised to consider this information before making any decisions regarding their shares.

data.title: Pioneer Power Announces Financial Results for Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025
data.description: In Fort Lee, New Jersey, Pioneer Power Solutions, Inc. (Nasdaq: PPSI) disclosed its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2025. Pioneer, a prominent company specializing in distributed energy resources, power generation tools, and portable electric vehicle (“EV”) charging solutions, reported on its latest endeavors. Notably, Pioneer's significant achievement was the global expansion of the e-Boost ecosystem, marking a successful venture into foreign markets.

data.title: Solmate Infrastructure Shareholders Approve Corporate Name Change and Other Measures to Support Solana Infrastructure Focus
data.description: Solmate Infrastructure, a prominent Solana infrastructure company focusing on Abu Dhabi, disclosed that its shareholders endorsed crucial steps to harmonize the company's corporate framework with its high-quality Solana infrastructure and treasury functions. This decision was made during an extraordinary general meeting on April 7, 2026 in Dublin, Ireland. Solmate's parent company, Brera Holdings PLC (NASDAQ: SLMT), holds a leading position in the market. This move underscores the commitment to optimizing operations and maximizing shareholder value in the rapidly growing sector.

data.title: Convocation of the ordinary general shareholders meeting of Invalda INVL
data.description: The public joint stock company Invalda INVL has announced that their ordinary General Shareholders Meeting will take place on 30 April 2026 at 9:00 a.m. The meeting, called by the Board, will occur at the company's headquarters in Gynėjų str. 14, Vilnius, Lithuania. Shareholder registration will commence at 8:45 a.m. The company can be identified with the code 121304349.

data.title: BuzzFeed, Inc. to Release First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on Thursday, May 7, 2026
data.description: BuzzFeed, Inc. has announced that it will be disclosing its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 on Thursday, May 7, 2026. This update will provide stakeholders with insights into the company's earnings, revenue, and other key financial metrics for the initial three months of the year. The release of these results is a crucial event for investors, analysts, and the broader market to assess BuzzFeed's financial health and trajectory. The announcement date, May 7, marks an important milestone for the company as it evaluates and communicates its performance in the ever-evolving business landscape.

data.title: XMax Advances AI Strategy Through Development and Deployment of An AI Inference Platform
data.description: On April 8, 2026, XMax Inc. (NASDAQ: XWIN) revealed progress in its AI initiative by launching an AI inference platform. This move signifies a significant step in the company's transition towards a software-oriented and platform-centric AI business model.

data.title: Con Edison to Report 1st Quarter 2026 Earnings on May 7
data.description: Consolidated Edison, Inc., also known as Con Edison (NYSE: ED), is scheduled to announce its financial results for the 1st Quarter of 2026 on May 7, 2026, after the market closes. This holding company offers various energy-related products and services. Investors and stakeholders can anticipate the release of important figures regarding the company's performance during the first quarter of the year.
